title: elymus bungeanus subsp. pruinifer
intro:
Elymus bungeanus subsp. pruinifer is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a species of wheat grass or a type of wild grass found in various regions of Asia.

This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.

The health benefits of Elymus bungeanus subsp. pruinifer include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.

Elymus bungeanus subsp. pruinifer can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
